title: Arctic (and Antarctic!) Sea Ice Extent: November 23, 2023
summary: November 23 2023: The sea ice has continued to increase , but at a lower rate of 2.54% (from last week’s growth rate of 6.01%), from the level on 11/16/2023 of 9.893 M km 2 to 10.151 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager at NOAA’s Air Resourc...

title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 20 November, 2023
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 20 November, 2023 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
